news.t: PFM CRYPTO Launched the World's First "XRP Lightning Mining" Package, Locking in XRP Ecological Dividends within 24 Hours

holdings.infoBox: PFM is an equity ETF with a total of 433 individual holdings. The top holdings are Broadcom stock at 4.64%, Apple at 4.28%, Microsoft at 3.86%, Eli Lilly and Company at 3.81%, and Walmart at 3.44%.

overview.description: The Invesco Dividend Achievers ETF (PFM) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the NASDAQ US Broad Dividend Achievers index, a market-cap-weighted index of dividend-paying US companies that have increased their annual dividends. PFM was launched on Sep 15, 2005 and is issued by Invesco.
infoTable: NASDAQ US Broad Dividend Achievers Index
